main: Gives {sinner:2} {status:Combustion} and at 15+ (or with the corrosion) inflicts {status:FaustFlameMothEmber} on enemies, which triggers {status:Combustion} additional times.
Lets her ignore the death condition of {identity:10211}'s S3-2 once. She heals and gains {keyword:Blunt} and {keyword:Wrath} damage for a turn instead.
other: Inflicts {status:Combustion} Potency and Count based on {keyword:Wrath} Res. and gains {status:CrimsonDamageUp} next turn if she has enough {status:Combustion}.

passiveList.desc:
This effect triggers immediately after using E.G.O Skill

For every 10 [Combustion] on self, increase [Combustion] Potency inflicted on enemies with this unit's Base Attack Skill effects and Coin effects by 1 (max 2, excluding 'Unique Burn')

When this unit uses 'A.B.S Max Attunement 【Degraded Corrosion】'  Skill, this unit does not die at the Skill's Attack End; instead, heal 40% HP and gain 2 [HitDamageUp] and 1 [CrimsonDamageUp] next turn (once per Encounter)
passiveList.name: Unsnuffed Embers
